## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Logic and GrowthX teams to discuss content updates, AI visibility, and ongoing collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/iMytAuVvg3kqbFVj36C-hzn3txn4WsKU?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Three new articles sent for review; first blog post published](https://fathom.video/share/iMytAuVvg3kqbFVj36C-hzn3txn4WsKU?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Scrunch dashboard introduced, but potential issue with "Logic" keyword detection](https://fathom.video/share/iMytAuVvg3kqbFVj36C-hzn3txn4WsKU?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Content production to increase to 5 pieces/week; handover to execution team planned for week 8](https://fathom.video/share/iMytAuVvg3kqbFVj36C-hzn3txn4WsKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
  - [Ongoing review process confirmed, with flexibility for future adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/iMytAuVvg3kqbFVj36C-hzn3txn4WsKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)

## Topics

### Content Updates and Feedback

  - [Three new articles sent for review, including image choices](https://fathom.video/share/iMytAuVvg3kqbFVj36C-hzn3txn4WsKU?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [First blog post published; minimal high-level feedback, some tactical adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/iMytAuVvg3kqbFVj36C-hzn3txn4WsKU?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Recommendation: Record product demo to ensure accurate representation of Logic's capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/iMytAuVvg3kqbFVj36C-hzn3txn4WsKU?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Free trial access for Logic product available from October 15th](https://fathom.video/share/iMytAuVvg3kqbFVj36C-hzn3txn4WsKU?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)

### AI Visibility and Scrunch Dashboard

  - [Scrunch tool measures AI visibility across LLMs (ChatGPT, Claude, Google Gemini, Perplexity)](https://fathom.video/share/iMytAuVvg3kqbFVj36C-hzn3txn4WsKU?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [Currently tracking 175 prompts; can add more based on customer questions](https://fathom.video/share/iMytAuVvg3kqbFVj36C-hzn3txn4WsKU?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Dashboard shows competitive presence, overall position, and citations](https://fathom.video/share/iMytAuVvg3kqbFVj36C-hzn3txn4WsKU?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
  - [Potential issue identified: "Logic" keyword may be over-detected, skewing results](https://fathom.video/share/iMytAuVvg3kqbFVj36C-hzn3txn4WsKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
  - [Action: Aida to contact Scrunch team about filtering out false positives](https://fathom.video/share/iMytAuVvg3kqbFVj36C-hzn3txn4WsKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)

### Strategies for Improving AI Visibility

  - [Getting on review sites (G2, TrustRadius)](https://fathom.video/share/iMytAuVvg3kqbFVj36C-hzn3txn4WsKU?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
  - [Securing external validation through press releases](https://fathom.video/share/iMytAuVvg3kqbFVj36C-hzn3txn4WsKU?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
  - [LinkedIn influencer engagement and blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/iMytAuVvg3kqbFVj36C-hzn3txn4WsKU?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [Consistent, high-quality content production remains key](https://fathom.video/share/iMytAuVvg3kqbFVj36C-hzn3txn4WsKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)

### Content Production and Team Transition

  - [Current production: 3 pieces/week, increasing to 5/week next week](https://fathom.video/share/iMytAuVvg3kqbFVj36C-hzn3txn4WsKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
  - [Handover to execution team planned for week 8 if engagement continues](https://fathom.video/share/iMytAuVvg3kqbFVj36C-hzn3txn4WsKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)
  - [Smooth transition process with internal handoff document and team introductions](https://fathom.video/share/iMytAuVvg3kqbFVj36C-hzn3txn4WsKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)

### Review Process

  - [Azzam to continue reviewing all content for now](https://fathom.video/share/iMytAuVvg3kqbFVj36C-hzn3txn4WsKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [Option to switch to post-publication review when confidence in content quality increases](https://fathom.video/share/iMytAuVvg3kqbFVj36C-hzn3txn4WsKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [Team to alert if review process becomes a bottleneck](https://fathom.video/share/iMytAuVvg3kqbFVj36C-hzn3txn4WsKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1824.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Azzam to review three new articles and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/iMytAuVvg3kqbFVj36C-hzn3txn4WsKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
  - [Aida to investigate Scrunch keyword detection issue and report back](https://fathom.video/share/iMytAuVvg3kqbFVj36C-hzn3txn4WsKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
  - [Team to increase content production to 5 pieces/week](https://fathom.video/share/iMytAuVvg3kqbFVj36C-hzn3txn4WsKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
  - [Prepare for potential handover to execution team in weeks 7-8](https://fathom.video/share/iMytAuVvg3kqbFVj36C-hzn3txn4WsKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)
  - [Continue weekly sync meetings to discuss progress and adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/iMytAuVvg3kqbFVj36C-hzn3txn4WsKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
